title: UP 2595/6/7 + 2626 + 2647 - Onboarding updates
summary: Comprehensive onboarding flow updates across all screens including welcome, introduction, engine overview, and installation steps. Changes include UI refinements (skeleton re-coloring, adjusted heights), copy updates with tooltips and time estimates, and navigation improvements for GenAI engine creation variant. Visual differences validated by automated testing.
userImpact: Users experience an improved onboarding journey with clearer instructions, better visual hierarchy, updated messaging, and streamlined navigation to engine setup and GenAI engine creation.
author: marcin.szczepaniak

title: [UP-2445] Delete Model
summary: Implemented a dedicated deletion workflow for Gen-AI models with a new modal component that handles the specific requirements of AI model deletion. The feature refactors the model deletion logic to split handling between Gen-AI models and regular models, ensuring proper cleanup of associated datasets and the ability to dismiss the modal even when background tasks are queued.
userImpact: Users can now delete Gen-AI models through a dedicated modal interface with proper handling of dependent resources and task states.

title: fix(deps): update dependency openai to v5
summary: Updates the OpenAI Node.js SDK from v4 to v5, bringing new audio helpers, additional API endpoints (including `/v1/responses`, `GET /chat/completions`, and container endpoints), built-in tools support, and type annotation improvements. This major version upgrade includes enhanced functionality for audio processing and response handling.
userImpact: Users can now leverage new OpenAI API features including audio helpers, response management endpoints, and built-in tools through the updated SDK.

summary: Updated the new metric modal to automatically set the metric name to the metric type when the name input is untouched or matches the metric type. Additionally, reordered the metric type and name input fields for improved UX. This reduces manual data entry and streamlines metric creation.

title: UP-2583: Pin in deep dive tag
summary: Implemented the pin_in_deep_dive tag functionality that allows users to pin specific columns to appear at the front of the inference deep dive view. Tagged columns now display prominently alongside other tagged columns in the deep dive interface.

title: [FE] UP-2448, UP-2449 inference fixes
summary: Improved inference filtering and table display with a new custom filters popover, better column type handling, and enhanced schema editor. Added support for filtering inferences by different column types and cosmetic improvements to the inference table UI. Includes comprehensive test coverage and schema editor v2 refactoring.
userImpact: Users can now apply more flexible filters to inference tables with better support for different column types, and benefit from an improved schema editor interface for managing inference schemas.
author: marcin.szczepaniak

title: UP-2465 - temporary chat view
summary: Added a temporary chat view interface for AI models with supporting UI updates to the GenAiModelSuccessModal. This new view includes visual assets and localization strings to enable users to interact with chat functionality within the model workflows.
userImpact: Users can now access a temporary chat view when working with AI models.
author: jakubdom

title: chore(deps): update all non-major dependencies to v22.15.1
summary: Updated Node.js runtime and Cypress base image from v22.15.0 to v22.15.1 across CI and Docker configurations. This patch release includes two security fixes: CVE-2025-23166 (error handling on async crypto operations) and CVE-2025-23165 (missing cleanup call in filesystem operations).
userImpact: No direct user impact. Security patches applied to build and test infrastructure.
author: group_3720083_bot_bf89c4e378f22b6cb8b2f93b06d47dae

title: [UP-2536]: Redirect signed-in users to root path when trying to access /signup
summary: When signed-in users attempted to access the /signup page, they were not redirected appropriately. This fix implements a loader that automatically redirects authenticated users back to the root path when they try to access /signup, preventing confusion and improving the authentication flow.
userImpact: Signed-in users are now automatically redirected to the root path when attempting to access the signup page, preventing access to signup after already being authenticated.
author: jakub.ziemba

title: Chat playground
summary: Introduces a new Chat Playground component that allows users to interact with OpenAI models directly. The feature includes a full chat interface with message history, model configuration options, request validation with visual feedback, and integration with both OpenAI and Shield clients for secure API communication.
userImpact: Users can now access an interactive Chat Playground to test and experiment with OpenAI models, configure model parameters, and see real-time validation feedback on their requests.
author: marcin.szczepaniak

title: fix(deps): update all non-major dependencies
summary: Updated non-major dependencies across the project, including patches for i18next (fixing nsSeparator handling), Amplitude Analytics, and Knip, plus Node.js runtime to 22.15.1. These dependency updates bring bug fixes and minor improvements to dependencies without introducing breaking changes.
userImpact: Users benefit from i18next bug fix ensuring nsSeparator is properly respected, plus performance and stability improvements from updated dependencies.
author: group_3720083_bot_bf89c4e378f22b6cb8b2f93b06d47dae

title: fix(deps): update all non-major dependencies
summary: This MR updates non-major dependencies including @amplitude/analytics-browser (patch), @types/node (patch), and @types/react-dom (patch). These are routine dependency maintenance updates managed by Renovate Bot to keep development dependencies current with their latest patch versions.

title: UP-2326 - the alert rule results graph fixes
summary: Fixed multiple issues in the alert rule results graph component including error handling, multi-dimensional key/value display, and tooltip rendering. These fixes improve the accuracy and usability of alert performance charts throughout the application.
userImpact: Alert rule results graphs now display correctly with proper error handling, accurate multi-dimensional filtering, and functional tooltips.
author: jakubdom

title: UP-2466 - Dataset information table updates
summary: Added a copy button to the dataset information summary table and fixed associated tooltips for improved usability. The changes apply to dataset overview and model alert rule summary table components to make dataset metadata more easily shareable.
userImpact: Users can now copy dataset information directly from the summary table with a single click, with corrected tooltip behavior for better clarity.

title: [UP-2428] Link Existing Models
summary: Adds functionality to link existing models to datasets within the GenAI model creation workflow. This change extends the model configuration step to fetch, filter, and display available datasets in a table, allowing users to select and link datasets during model setup. The implementation includes metrics confirmation, proper state management, and UI refinements across the stepper flow.
userImpact: Users can now link existing models to datasets through an improved configuration workflow that displays and filters available datasets.
author: jakub.ziemba

title: fix(deps): update all non-major dependencies
summary: This MR updates non-major dependencies across the project via Renovate, including patch updates to TypeScript ESLint tools, React type definitions, and other dev dependencies, plus a minor version bump for lucide-react. All changes are routine dependency maintenance with no breaking changes.
userImpact: No direct user impact

title: UP-2402 fix threshold so alert rule is testable when threshold is zero
summary: Fixed a validation issue that prevented the TEST ALERT RULE button from being enabled when the threshold value was zero. Zero is a valid threshold for alert rules, but was incorrectly treated as an invalid or empty value during form validation.
userImpact: Users can now test alert rules with a threshold value of zero, which was previously blocked by an incorrect validation check.
author: ianmcgraw

title: chore(deps): update dependency lint-staged to v16
summary: Updated lint-staged from v15 to v16, a major version bump that changes process spawning from execa to nano-spawn and removes the --shell flag. This is a development dependency update that may require configuration adjustments if Node.js scripts are used as tasks or shell evaluation is relied upon.
userImpact: No direct user impact; development tooling update that may require task configuration changes for lint-staged setup.

title: UP-2456 add new job type for linking genAI model
summary: Added a new job type for linking GenAI models to existing tasks, including translations in English UI and job label strings. This enables users to connect generative AI models within the task workflow system.
userImpact: Users can now link GenAI models to existing tasks as a new job type within the platform.

title: UP-2297 - Installation command update
summary: Updated the installation command display in the onboarding flow and improved error handling for disabled raw data retrieval. The installation step UI has been refactored to show clearer instructions, and the data retrieval logs component now displays appropriate error messages when raw data retrieval is disabled.

title: UP-2438 & UP-2439 - user invitation fixes
summary: Fixed errors on the user invitation page that were preventing successful user invitations. Changes made to the newUserFlow component to address validation and submission issues in the invitation workflow.
userImpact: Users can now successfully invite new users without encountering errors on the invitation page.

title: fix(deps): update all non-major dependencies
summary: Updated 10 non-major dependencies across the project, including minor updates to @alwaysmeticulous/recorder-loader and globals, along with patch updates to Babel, TypeScript types, Cypress, ESLint configs, Turbo, and other build tools. All updates are routine maintenance with no breaking changes.
userImpact: No direct user impact.

title: [no-ref] tweak raw data permission error copy
summary: Updated error message copy for the raw data permission restriction to improve clarity when users lack permission to read raw data in a project. This accompanies backend changes to support the new "Raw Data Viewer" role that can be bound at multiple levels (organization, workspace, and project).
userImpact: Users now see clearer error messaging when they attempt to access raw data without the required permissions.
author: ianmcgraw

title: UP-2401 - enabling signup page based on feature flag
summary: The signup page is now controlled by the `account_creation_enabled` feature flag, allowing the signup functionality to be toggled without code changes. This enables safer rollouts and A/B testing of the signup flow in production.
userImpact: Users can now access the signup page when the `account_creation_enabled` feature flag is enabled, and the page can be disabled server-side without requiring a deployment.
author: jakubdom

title: UP-2230 - Schema editor v2
summary: Replaced the legacy schema editor with a fully functional schema editor v2, featuring improved rendering logic, context-based state management, and comprehensive schema mapping utilities. The refactor resolves issues with undefined dtypes and joined datasets receiving undefined schemas while modernizing the component architecture.
userImpact: Users can now edit dataset schemas with an improved, more reliable schema editor interface that handles complex dataset scenarios more robustly.
author: marcin.szczepaniak

title: UP-1943 - disabling column reorder for project models table fix
summary: Disabled column reordering for the project models table to prevent unintended user interactions. This fix removes the reorder functionality from the ProjectModelsTable component while maintaining it for the JobsTable component.
userImpact: Users can no longer accidentally reorder columns in the project models table, ensuring a stable and predictable table layout.
author: jakubdom

title: fix(deps): update all non-major dependencies
summary: This MR updates multiple non-major dependencies across the project, including patches for @amplitude/analytics-browser, @types/node, and @vitest/coverage-istanbul, as well as minor version updates for @typescript-eslint packages, i18next, knip, and vite. The updates are automated via Renovate and include no breaking changes.
userImpact: No direct user impact — these are dependency maintenance updates that improve tooling and patch potential issues in development and production libraries.

title: UP-2292 - updating user invitation page based on feature flag
summary: The add new user flow has been updated to conditionally enable user invitation based on a feature flag. Changes include updates to the user information step UI, form schema, and supporting components to respect the feature flag configuration when allowing users to be created.
userImpact: Users can now have the user invitation flow enabled or disabled dynamically through a feature flag without requiring code changes.
author: jakubdom

title: UP-2426 add permissions check for editing dashboard
summary: Added a new `model_edit_dashboard` permission check to prevent read-only users from editing dashboards. The implementation gates the dashboard editing UI based on user permissions, protecting the dashboard from unauthorized modifications while maintaining full functionality for users with appropriate permissions.
userImpact: Read-only users can no longer edit dashboards; only users with the `model_edit_dashboard` permission can modify dashboard content.
author: ianmcgraw

title: fix(deps): update dependency react-error-boundary to v6
summary: Updated react-error-boundary from v5 to v6. The v6 release is ESM-only, dropping CommonJS support to better work with modern tooling. This is a major version bump that may require build tool updates or module resolution configuration changes.
userImpact: Users must ensure their build toolchain supports ESM modules; CommonJS consumers will need to migrate to ESM or update their module resolution configuration.
author: group_3720083_bot_bf89c4e378f22b6cb8b2f93b06d47dae

title: fix(deps): update all non-major dependencies

summary: Implements API Key management for model configurations, allowing users to generate, view, and regenerate API keys with a dedicated modal interface. The feature includes key validation, command examples with inference ID support, and comprehensive error handling and confirmation dialogs to prevent accidental key regeneration.
userImpact: Users can now manage API keys for model operations through an intuitive modal interface with the ability to regenerate keys safely and view usage examples with their inference IDs.

title: UP-2212 - adding loading spinner
summary: Added a loading spinner to the new dataset modal to provide visual feedback while the schema is being loaded. This improves the user experience by indicating that a data loading operation is in progress.
userImpact: Users now see a loading spinner while creating a new dataset, providing clear feedback that the system is processing their request.
author: jakubdom

title: UP-2301 - fix for disabled skip button
summary: Fixed an issue where the skip button was remaining disabled in the schema step of the new dataset creation flow. The fix involved adjusting state management logic in the schemaStep and newDataset components to ensure the skip button becomes enabled at the appropriate time.
userImpact: Users can now successfully use the skip button when creating a new dataset and navigating through the schema step.
author: jakubdom

title: fix(deps): update all non-major dependencies

title: [UP-2259] single job view - display last attempt by default
summary: Fixed the single job view to display the last attempt by default instead of an incorrect default state. This ensures users see the most recent job attempt when navigating to the job details page.
userImpact: Users now see the last job attempt displayed by default when viewing a job's details, making the job view more intuitive and useful.
author: jakub.ziemba

title: [UP-2310] Workspaces view search bar + UI fixes for multiple workspaces
summary: Added a search bar to the workspaces view that allows users to filter workspaces by name in real-time. The implementation includes UI fixes for proper styling and display when multiple workspaces are present, with input trimming to handle whitespace correctly.
userImpact: Users can now search and filter workspaces by name, with improved UI presentation when managing multiple workspaces.
author: jakub.ziemba

title: UP-1943 - disabling column reorder for project models table
summary: Disabled column reordering functionality for the project models table to improve table stability and user experience. This prevents accidental column reorganization and maintains a consistent column layout across user sessions.
userImpact: Users can no longer reorder columns in the project models table, ensuring a fixed and consistent column layout.
author: jakubdom

title: UP-2327 - updating permission check and error message for data retrieval
summary: Updated permission check logic and improved error messaging for data retrieval in the inferences table. The changes enhance the permission validation flow and provide users with clearer feedback when they lack the necessary permissions to access data.
userImpact: Users now receive a more informative error message when they lack permissions to retrieve data, instead of experiencing unclear loading states.
author: jakubdom

title: UP-2285 - Add email domain tracking in aplitude
summary: Added email domain tracking capability to Amplitude analytics service. This enhancement expands the analytics data collected to include email domain information, enabling better segmentation and analysis of user demographics.
userImpact: Users' email domain information is now tracked in Amplitude analytics for improved user segmentation and reporting capabilities.

title: UP-1932 - Add a dashboard selector based on model problem types
summary: Added a dashboard selector that intelligently routes users to the appropriate dashboard based on their model's problem type. The implementation includes a custom fallback for model problem types and i18n label support to ensure proper labeling across different languages.
userImpact: Users can now automatically see the most relevant dashboard for their specific model's problem type without manual selection.
author: marcin.szczepaniak

title: fix(deps): update all non-major dependencies

title: UP-2381 - Querying engine internal connectors
summary: Replaces connector selection with engine selection for GenAI models, enabling users to query internal connectors through engines. The change includes a new engine configuration step during onboarding, a toggle for raw data retrieval, and improved UI components for engine selection via autocomplete.
userImpact: Users can now select and configure GenAI engines directly instead of connectors, with support for enabling raw data retrieval and configuring engine-specific settings during the onboarding flow.
author: marcin.szczepaniak

title: UP-2311 improving error message for deleting dataset or connector
summary: Improved error messages displayed when users attempt to delete a dataset or connector. The changes were made to the DashboardActionsSelect component and the deleteConnectorButton component to provide clearer feedback during deletion operations.
userImpact: Users now receive clearer, more informative error messages when attempting to delete datasets or connectors, helping them better understand why an operation failed or what action is required.

title: UP-2301 - adding subtitle
summary: Added a subtitle to the dataset creation schema step informing users that adding a timestamp might be required. This improves clarity in the UI by providing additional context during the dataset setup process.
userImpact: Users now see a subtitle indicating that a timestamp might be required when creating a new dataset.
author: jakubdom

title: UP-2244, 1929, 2396, 2413 - Plethora of minor bugfixes
summary: This MR addresses multiple minor bugs and improvements across the UI layer, including updated links, new loading states, improved placeholder text, and enhanced copy strings. It also adds dataset renaming functionality and improves the dataset view layout, with multiple visual refinements to the project modal and alert rules components.
userImpact: Users can now rename datasets, benefit from improved loading indicators and placeholder text, and experience a more polished UI with updated links and better visual feedback across projects, datasets, and model alert rules.

summary: Added an error boundary component around the Upsolve dashboard to gracefully handle and display errors that occur during dashboard rendering. This improves the stability and user experience by preventing unhandled exceptions from crashing the entire dashboard interface.

title: [UP-2294] Sticky workspace sessions
summary: Workspace selection is now persistent across sessions. The app reads the last selected workspace from localStorage when navigating to /workspaces and automatically redirects to that workspace, while saving the user's workspace selection whenever they switch workspaces. This eliminates the need to re-select a workspace on every session.
userImpact: Users are automatically returned to their last selected workspace when revisiting the app, eliminating manual workspace selection on every session.

title: UP-2299 - datasets fixes
summary: Fixed issues in dataset management and joining workflows. Changes include corrections to the DashboardActionsSelect component, dataset view, and the JoinDatasets component to resolve bugs affecting dataset operations.
userImpact: Dataset operations and joining datasets now work correctly without the previous bugs.

title: fix(deps): update all non-major dependencies
summary: Updated non-major dependencies across the project, including jsdom (v26.1.0) with improved SVG element support, yarn package manager (v4.9.1), and several dev dependencies. These updates bring bug fixes, performance improvements, and expanded DOM API coverage without breaking changes.

title: UP-2221 adding names for new job types

author: ianmcgraw

title: UP-2221 update generated type names for new PostJobKind
summary: Updated generated type definitions to reflect the separation of `PostJobKind` (directly submittable job types) from `JobKind` (all job types, including internal-only types). The API contract removed unsupported job types like `fetch_data` from direct submission, which now must be created via `/data_retrieval` operations instead. This aligns the frontend types with the backend API changes to prevent certain job types from being directly submittable.
userImpact: Users will no longer be able to directly submit certain job types (like `fetch_data`) via the POST /jobs API; these must now be created through the appropriate `/data_retrieval` operations on datasets.
author: ianmcgraw

title: UP-2332 - Metrics editing tweaks, finalizing model creation flow
summary: Completed the GenAI model creation flow by unifying metrics editing between tabular and GenAI metrics under a single view, adding support for editing and creating new metrics, and implementing automatic navigation to the model page after successful creation. The changes streamline the metrics configuration experience with improved styling, validation requiring all metrics to be committed before saving, and a success confirmation modal.
userImpact: Users can now seamlessly create GenAI models with a completed workflow that includes unified metrics editing, the ability to add new metrics during model creation, and automatic navigation to the new model page upon successful completion.
author: marcin.szczepaniak

title: fix(deps): update dependency @hookform/resolvers to v5

userImpact: Users can now leverage improved TypeScript type inference in form schemas and benefit from compatibility with newer versions of validation libraries like Zod v4.

title: UP-2087 - adding v1 of engines management
summary: Introduces the first version of engines management, allowing users to view, add, and manage engines (formerly called data planes) within their workspace. The implementation includes a management page with an engines table, modals for adding new engines and regenerating credentials, and comprehensive routing and internationalization support.
userImpact: Users can now access the engines management interface to view all engines in their workspace, add new engines via a dedicated modal, and regenerate credential sets for existing engines.

title: fix: return to new model configuration on "back" click

title: Add typesafe translation hook
summary: Introduces a new typesafe translation hook (`useT`) that provides compile-time type checking for translation keys across the application. The hook supports optional key prefixes and replaces manual translation path references with strongly-typed alternatives, reducing runtime translation errors. This change involved refactoring multiple components throughout the codebase to use the new hook and adding missing translation entries.
userImpact: Developers can now use type-checked translation keys with the `useT` hook, preventing invalid translation references at compile time and improving the developer experience when working with i18n.
author: marcin.szczepaniak

title: UP-2084: Refresh button on list datasets page
summary: Added a refresh button to the list datasets page in the available datasets view. This allows users to manually refresh the dataset list without navigating away from the page.
userImpact: Users can now refresh the list of available datasets by clicking a refresh button on the list datasets page.
author: sergai

title: fix(deps): update dependency cron to v4
summary: Updated cron dependency from v3.5.0 to v4.0.0. This major version introduces breaking changes including dropped support for Node v16 and a renamed property from job.running to job.isActive.
userImpact: Code using the cron library must be updated to use job.isActive instead of job.running, and Node v16 is no longer supported.

summary: The generic table parser now ensures an ID is present for all entries. This involved removing a custom generateId utility and adopting a more robust ID handling mechanism throughout the InferencesTableWrapper and related components.
userImpact: Generic table parsing now correctly requires and enforces ID presence, preventing data integrity issues in table rendering.

userImpact: Users will no longer experience looping pop-ups when viewing the model dashboard.

The new structure allows users to test connector configurations automatically during setup rather than after creation, with improved visual presentation and test coverage.

title: UP-1706: MUI migration from v5 to v6
summary: Updated Material-UI (MUI) from v5 to v6 across the application. Visual testing detected 47 UI differences across 1174 screens, confirming the migration's scope and impact on the component library.
userImpact: Users benefit from MUI v6's improved performance, new styling capabilities, and modernized component APIs, with visual consistency maintained across the application after comprehensive testing.

summary: This MR implements the ability for users to reset their own credentials and for organization administrators to reset service account credentials. The changes include a refactored CredentialsModal component with improved UI (padding fixes, hidden-by-default fields, and visibility controls) and updates to the user credentials flow across the organization management interface.
userImpact: Users and administrators can now reset user and service account credentials through the updated credentials modal in the organization management and user profile interfaces.
author: sergai

title: Update all non-major dependencies
summary: Updated non-major dependencies including @mui/x-date-pickers-pro (patch), @types/react (patch), i18next (minor), and lucide-react (minor). These are routine dependency updates that improve compatibility and include bug fixes from upstream packages.
userImpact: No direct user impact—these are dependency maintenance updates that ensure compatibility and receive upstream bug fixes.
author: group_3720083_bot_bf89c4e378f22b6cb8b2f93b06d47dae

title: UP-1924 enable meticulous recording on prod
summary: Meticulous recording has been enabled on Arthur's production environment. This configuration change allows session recording and visual testing to capture real user interactions and screen states in prod, improving observability and regression detection.
userImpact: Users on production Arthur can now have their sessions recorded and analyzed by Meticulous for quality assurance and visual regression testing.
author: ianmcgraw

title: UP-1847 header UI fixes
summary: Updated the header UI with fixes and refactoring to the tabs header component. Changes include refactored ModelDashboard component, new ModelManagementSelect component for improved selection UI, and adjustments to the model view layout for better presentation.
userImpact: Users now see an improved header UI with updated tabs and better model selection functionality.
author: jakubdom

title: UP-1924 point FE to new dev env
summary: Updated frontend staging environment configuration to point to the new https://scope-v4.dev.arthur.ai development environment, replacing the legacy https://scope.dev.arthur.ai endpoint. This change aligns the FE with Arthur's latest deployment infrastructure as the old environment is being decommissioned.
userImpact: No direct user impact. This is an internal infrastructure migration for staging environments.
author: ianmcgraw

title: UP-1873 display the right dashboard and inference deep dive based on the model_problem_type
summary: Added logic to display the correct Upsolve dashboard and inference deep dive based on a model's problem type. The system now routes users to one of four dashboards (Shield, Binary Classification, Regression, or Custom) and corresponding inference deep dive views based on the model's `model_problem_type` field, with a short-term solution handling single vs. multiple problem types.
userImpact: Users now see the appropriate dashboard and inference analytics interface tailored to their model's specific problem type, improving relevance and usability of insights.
author: ianmcgraw

title: UP-1921: Cypress CI pipeline optimization
summary: Optimized the Cypress CI pipeline to serve the application from production-ready built assets using `vite preview` instead of the development server. This ensures Cypress tests run against the final bundled version of the application, providing a more accurate simulation of the production environment and improving test reliability.
userImpact: Cypress end-to-end tests now run on the production-ready version of the application, improving test accuracy and reliability in the CI pipeline.
author: sergai

title: UP-1916 fixing error when skipping refresh data on adding data connector
summary: Added `<Suspense>` wrapper to `<CustomAwait>` component to resolve errors that occurred when skipping refresh data during data connector creation. This ensures proper async loading state handling in the new connector workflow.
userImpact: Users can now successfully skip refresh data when adding a new data connector without encountering errors.
author: jakubdom

title: UP-1848] - Single dataset view
summary: Introduces a new single dataset view page accessible via `/models/:id/datasets/:id`, allowing users to inspect individual datasets in detail. The implementation includes a dataset overview card, inferences tab, schema display with proper handling of joined datasets, and comprehensive test coverage with e2e tests validating the new routing and UI components.
userImpact: Users can now navigate to and view detailed information about individual datasets, including their schema, inferences, and configuration details, with proper support for joined datasets.
author: marcin.szczepaniak

title: UP-1840 updating models table on project home page
summary: The models table on the project home page now auto-refreshes every 5 seconds and updates immediately after any change. This ensures users see the most current state of their models without manual intervention.
userImpact: Users can now see real-time updates in the models table on the project home page with automatic 5-second refresh intervals.
author: jakubdom

title: Update all non-major dependencies
summary: Updated non-major dependencies across the monorepo including minor updates to @alwaysmeticulous/recorder-loader, @eslint/js, and @lottiefiles/dotlottie-react, along with patch updates to MUI packages and other development dependencies. This automated dependency maintenance improves compatibility and pulls in bug fixes and improvements from upstream packages.
userImpact: No direct user impact
author: group_3720083_bot_bf89c4e378f22b6cb8b2f93b06d47dae

title: UP-1798: update user object to separate first and last name
summary: The user object has been refactored to store first and last names as separate fields instead of a combined full name. A new userFormatter utility function has been added to handle combining these fields with proper spacing. All components and test fixtures have been updated to work with the new structure across the application.
userImpact: User full names are now stored separately as first_name and last_name fields, enabling better data structure and flexibility while maintaining consistent name display across the UI.
author: alex380125

title: UP-1889 Generic table float parser tweak
summary: Improved the generic table float and timestamp parser to handle edge cases more safely. Added support for numeric timestamps and made both the timestamp and number formatters more robust through updated parsing logic. Includes comprehensive test coverage for the number formatter to ensure correct behavior across various input types.
userImpact: Users will now see correctly formatted numbers and timestamps in generic inference tables, with better handling of numeric timestamp values and improved robustness against malformed inputs.
author: marcin.szczepaniak

title: [UP-1553] - datasets list
summary: Added a new datasets list view within the models section, featuring pagination, filtering by connector type and other attributes, and a dedicated UI for browsing available datasets. The implementation includes new components for layout, columns configuration, and filter parsing, along with translations and test coverage.
userImpact: Users can now view and browse datasets associated with models, filtering them by connector type and other properties, with full pagination support.
author: marcin.szczepaniak

title: NO-REF: Comply with ESLint Rules for useLocation call
summary: Updated useRouteMatch hook to comply with ESLint rules for the useLocation call. This change resolves linting violations in the hook implementation without altering functionality.
userImpact: No direct user impact.
author: sergai

title: UP-1713 enable upsolve dashboard editing
summary: Enables users to create new charts directly within the embedded Upsolve dashboard. This upgrade to Upsolve 5.5.1 unlocks dashboard editing capabilities previously unavailable in the client-side interface, allowing for greater customization and flexibility when managing dashboard visualizations.
userImpact: Users can now create and edit charts directly in the embedded dashboard without requiring backend intervention.
author: ianmcgraw

title: UP-1751 Update the view after user cancels the setup while adding a project artifact
summary: Fixed the redirect path when a user cancels the new connector form during project artifact setup. Previously, users were redirected to the connectors page; now they are correctly returned to the project page they were working on.
userImpact: Users are now redirected to the correct project page after canceling the connector setup, improving the navigation experience.
author: jakubdom

title: UP-1882: Removing unused @codemirrow/view package
summary: Removed the unused @codemirror/view package dependency from the project. This cleanup reduces the dependency footprint and improves maintainability by eliminating an unused library that was previously included in the package.json.
userImpact: No direct user impact

title: Chore: Fix imports for MUI data grid
summary: Fixed import paths for Material-UI (MUI) data grid components across multiple files. This includes updates to data grid imports in group and role selection tables, as well as the generic inference deep dive table component.
userImpact: No direct user impact

title: UP-1867 Delete user button
summary: Added a delete user button to the user management interface in the organization management view. This allows administrators to remove users directly from the user detail page, improving user management workflows.
userImpact: Administrators can now delete users directly from the user detail page in organization management.
author: sergai

title: React router dom bump
summary: Updated react-router-dom dependency from v6 to v7, addressing API changes introduced in the major version upgrade. Fixed type issues and removed deprecated defers patterns across 15+ route loader files to ensure compatibility with the new router version.
userImpact: Users benefit from the latest react-router-dom improvements, including bug fixes and performance enhancements, with no breaking changes to the application's user-facing behavior.
author: marcin.szczepaniak

title: UP-1821 Make Project Activity Log Clickable
summary: Made the Project Activity Log clickable by linking the jobs table header to the activity logs view. This improves navigation by allowing users to jump directly to activity logs from the jobs table without additional steps.
userImpact: Users can now click on the jobs table header to navigate directly to the project activity logs view.
author: jakubdom

title: UP-1854: Service account profile tab
summary: Added a service account profile tab with credentials management capabilities. The implementation includes a new CredentialsModal component and ServiceAccountCredentials view to display and manage service account credentials, along with refactored user creation flows to handle both regular users and service accounts with improved type safety.
userImpact: Users can now view and manage service account credentials directly from the service account profile tab.
author: sergai

title: UP-1696: dataset tag changes
summary: Updated dataset tag handling to align with backend changes in dataset specification. The frontend now correctly processes dataset tags as set by backend connectors rather than hardcoding values, improving consistency with how shield datasets are handled.
userImpact: Dataset tags are now properly synchronized with backend-defined specifications, ensuring accurate dataset identification and classification in the UI.
author: alex380125

title: Update all non-major dependencies
summary: This MR updates all non-major dependencies across the project, including minor and patch updates to key packages like @emotion/react, @emotion/styled, @stylistic/eslint-plugin, and @testing-library/react, as well as patch updates to MUI and related libraries. The updates are purely dependency maintenance with no breaking changes, as verified by Meticulous visual testing across 968 screens.
userImpact: Users benefit from bug fixes, performance improvements, and security updates in dependencies, with no breaking changes or visual regressions.

title: UP-1856: Update to use new datasets object
summary: Updated the datasets schema and loader to match a backend breaking change to the datasets object structure. The changes include updating TypeScript components to safely handle the new object format with optional chaining and conditional checks, and regenerating the OpenAPI schema to match the latest backend specification.
userImpact: Users with existing dataset configurations will see the frontend properly handle the updated datasets object structure from the backend without errors.
author: alex380125

title: UP-1847 Update the header for dashboard tab
summary: Updated the dashboard tab header with new UI components including an Export Button and improved icon button styling. Refactored the ModelDashboard and RefreshButton components to improve maintainability and visual consistency with design specifications.
userImpact: Users can now see an improved dashboard header with better visual presentation and access to new export functionality on the dashboard tab.

title: Update all non-major dependencies

title: UP-1851: Create service account
summary: This MR implements service account creation functionality in the user management system. It adds a new account type selection step in the user creation flow, allowing organizations to create service accounts alongside regular users. The implementation includes new UI components for service account credentials display, updated user creation forms, and E2E tests.
userImpact: Users can now create service accounts in addition to regular user accounts through the organization management interface, with credentials securely displayed after creation.

title: UP-1861: Disabled organization field and workspace field (if one)
summary: Disabled the organization field and workspace field (when applicable) in role binding forms to restrict user modification of these values. Changes applied to the AddRoleBinding wrappers for Organization, Project, and Workspace components, with corresponding test updates.

title: CI: update changeset

title: UP-1805: Users/groups selection: scrollable views
summary: Implemented scrollable views for user and group selection modals to improve UX when dealing with large lists. Changes include adding scroll containers to GroupsSelectionTable, UsersSelectionTable, and their corresponding modal content components, while hiding the footer selected row count in these tables.

title: UP-1861: Role binding modal: enable selection with one option
summary: Fixed the role binding modal to allow selection when only one option is available. Previously, the modal disabled selection when a single option was present; this change enables users to select and confirm their choice even with one available option.

author: sergai

title: UP-1647: Data refresh schedule: fix for showing the next update time
summary: Fixed the display of the next update time in the data refresh schedule by reverting UTC format changes and adjusting the ExistingScheduleForm component. The fix ensures the scheduled time is presented correctly to users.

title: UP-1746 add minutes option to refresh data
summary: Added support for minutes as a refresh interval option in the data refresh scheduling feature. Users can now configure automated data refresh at minute-level granularity through both the standard and cron-based refresh forms, with corresponding UI labels and form utility updates.

summary: Updated all non-major dependencies across the monorepo to their latest patch and minor versions. This includes updates to build tools (Vite, Turbo), testing frameworks (Vitest), linters, and UI component libraries. All updates are non-breaking and improve compatibility and tooling stability.

summary: Added a new user profile tab to the organization management user details view. The implementation includes a UserProfileWrapper component and localized content strings, enabling users to view profile information within the user management interface.

summary: Updated Vite build tool dependency from v5.4.11 to v6.0.2. This major version upgrade includes multiple bug fixes including CSS asset handling with aliased SVGs, manifest generation for CSS codesplit configurations, optimizer promise resolution, module resolution improvements, and SSR target fixes.
userImpact: Users benefit from improved build stability and correctness, including fixes for CSS asset aliasing, proper style file manifest keys, and better SSR handling.

title: Update all non-major dependencies
summary: This MR updates 11 non-major dependencies across the project, including minor updates to TypeScript ESLint tooling, Prettier, and lucide-react, along with patch updates to axios, class-variance-authority, react-i18next, turbo, and yarn. All changes are routine dependency maintenance with no breaking changes.
userImpact: No direct user impact—this is routine dependency maintenance to keep development tools and libraries current.
author: group_3720083_bot_bf89c4e378f22b6cb8b2f93b06d47dae

title: UP-1784: Roles binding modal extension
summary: Extended the role binding modal to support additional entity types (users, groups, organizations, projects, workspaces) with improved UI components and selection handling. The AddRoleBindingModal component was refactored to accept configurable fields and render options, enabling broader use cases across different role binding scenarios.
userImpact: Users can now manage role bindings across more entity types through an extended and more flexible modal interface.
author: sergai

title: UP-1647: Edit a data refresh to always show UTC time zone
summary: Updated the data refresh schedule editing interface to consistently display times in UTC timezone. This change ensures users see a uniform and unambiguous timezone reference when editing scheduled data refreshes, improving clarity around scheduled job execution times.
userImpact: Users editing data refresh schedules will now always see times displayed in UTC timezone, eliminating timezone confusion.
author: sergai

title: UP-1818: Row selection cleaning
summary: Cleaned up row selection configuration in RowSelectTable component by removing redundant props that are enabled by default. The rowSelection and cursor: pointer properties were unnecessary as they are already true by default in the underlying styled grid implementation.
userImpact: No direct user impact. This is a code cleanup that maintains existing behavior while improving maintainability.
author: sergai

title: UP-1558 - Generic Inference Deep Dive Table
summary: Implemented a generic inference deep dive table component that extends the existing shield-specific inference table to support arbitrary JSON data structures. The solution includes new mappers for converting raw data to a flattened generic format, a TagSetupModal for dataset onboarding, and refactored base functionality shared between typed (shield) and generic inference tables.
userImpact: Users can now view and interact with inference results from generic datasets with flexible schemas, not just shield-format data, enabling deeper inspection of model outputs across different data types.
author: marcin.szczepaniak

title: Update dependency i18next to v24
summary: Updates i18next from v23 to v24.0.5 across dependencies, peerDependencies, and devDependencies. This major version includes bug fixes for locale detection, improved Intl API handling, and removal of legacy format support. The upgrade requires using the v4 JSON format for translations and mandates Intl API availability with fallback to dev language for missing plural rules.
userImpact: Users benefit from improved locale detection accuracy and enhanced internationalization support, though projects must ensure translation files are in v4 format and that environments support the Intl API.
author: group_3720083_bot_bf89c4e378f22b6cb8b2f93b06d47dae

title: UP-1749 Remove session explorer tab
summary: Removed the "Session explorer" tab from the model view interface. This streamlines the model detail page by eliminating an unused or deprecated feature, reducing UI clutter and focusing the interface on active functionality.
userImpact: Users will no longer see the Session explorer tab in the model view.
author: jakubdom

title: UP-1805: Implement useMatchMutation hook for invalidating the cache and refactor tables to infinite loading
summary: Introduced a new `useMatchMutation` hook to centralize cache key filtering and mutation logic, replacing the previous `findMutateKey` and `findInfiniteMutateKey` functions. Multiple management tables have been refactored from paginated to infinite loading implementation for improved scalability and user experience.
userImpact: Users now experience smoother pagination in management tables with infinite loading, and the codebase is more maintainable with the new centralized mutation hook.
author: sergai

title: UP-1805: Refactor StyledDataGrid factory to support overlay adjustment logic
summary: Refactored StyledDataGrid factory to support overlay adjustment logic for MUI DataGridPro. Added a custom hook (`useDataGridVisibleRowCount`) to manage and track visible row counts, enabling conditional minimum height application to overlay wrappers when no rows are visible. This is a temporary workaround for MUI v6 limitations that can be removed after upgrading to MUI v7.
userImpact: No direct user impact—this is an internal refactoring that improves DataGrid overlay handling and supports future MUI v7 migration.
author: sergai

title: Update all non-major dependencies
summary: Automated dependency updates across the project, including minor updates to TypeScript (5.6.3 → 5.7.2), the Meticulous recorder loader (2.172.0 → 2.175.0), and cronstrue (2.51.0 → 2.52.0), along with patch updates to MUI date pickers, Keycloak, Tailwind Merge, ESLint config, Turbo, dotenv-cli, and Yarn. These updates bring in bug fixes, performance improvements, and compatibility enhancements from upstream packages.
userImpact: Users benefit from improved TypeScript compiler features, bug fixes in authentication and UI components, and better build tool performance through updated dependencies.
author: group_3720083_bot_bf89c4e378f22b6cb8b2f93b06d47dae

title: NO-REF: Flat data memoization fix
summary: Fixed a memoization issue in the useApiInfinite hook where the component was not re-rendering when the isValidating flag changed. The useMemo hook for flatData was only tracking structural changes to swrInfinite.data but not the validation or refresh state, preventing loading indicators from displaying during data refresh. Removed the unnecessary memoization to ensure the component re-renders correctly when SWR's validation state updates.
userImpact: Loading indicators now display correctly during data refresh in tables that use the useApiInfinite hook.
author: sergai

title: UP-1775 Update cron error message
summary: Updated the cron job error message to be clearer and more user-friendly. Changes include improvements to the DataRefreshForm schema, localized error messages in English, and enhanced schedule form utilities to provide better feedback when cron expressions are invalid or problematic.
userImpact: Users will now see improved error messages when configuring cron-based data refresh schedules, making it easier to understand and fix scheduling issues.
author: jakubdom

title: UP-1637 adding tooltip on icon hover
summary: Modified the CronDataRefreshForm component to display a tooltip only when hovering over the refresh icon, rather than when hovering over the entire input field. This provides more precise user feedback and improves the UX for icon-specific actions.
userImpact: Users now see the tooltip only when hovering directly over the refresh icon, providing clearer context for the icon's action.
author: jakubdom

title: NO-REF: Updating upsolve to 5.3.8
summary: Updated the Upsolve dependency from a previous version to 5.3.8. userImpact: Users will see updated, clearer label text in the onboarding tasks section during connector setup.

title: UP-1431: Disable cancelling job
summary: The job cancellation feature has been temporarily disabled in the FloatingJobsQueue component. This change addresses an issue tracked in UP-1431 and prevents users from cancelling jobs through the UI until the underlying issue is resolved.

title: NO-REF: Unified suspense fallback

title: Update all non-major dependencies

title: Update all non-major dependencies

title: NO-REF - Remove flashing 'Loading' from job logs stream, replace with bar at the bottom

This improves the visual experience by eliminating distracting shimmer effects and providing a cleaner indication of streaming status.
userImpact: Users now see a stable progress indicator at the bottom of job logs when logs are streaming, eliminating the previous flashing "Loading" text that appeared during refresh requests.

title: [UP-1703] [FE] Activity Logs : Filters update
summary: Updated Activity Logs filters to use `ready_before_current_time` and `ready_after_current_time` parameters instead of client-side `Date.now()` calls. This ensures the frontend always retrieves the most current data while eliminating timing inconsistencies that could occur from frontend date generation.
userImpact: Users now see consistently up-to-date activity logs with improved filter accuracy and reliability.
author: kapotyrala-arthur

title: NO-REF: Improved Route Matching for Menu Selection
summary: Improved route matching logic for menu selection to support matching both URL patterns and their child paths. When a URL path matches a menu pattern or its child paths, the corresponding menu option is now automatically selected, providing more accurate and intuitive navigation behavior.
userImpact: Menu items are now correctly highlighted based on the current URL path, including child route paths, resulting in more accurate navigation feedback.

title: UP-1365: Missing permission checkers

title: NO-REF: Exposing isLoading flag for permission fetcher
